description_for_human: Dual-chain transparent toll gateway. Bridge RLUSD (XRPL) and USDC (Base/EVM) with gasless EIP-3009 authorization. Operated by Script Master Labs.
description_for_model: Ghost Layer is the neutral bridge between XRPL native RLUSD payments and Base/EVM gasless USDC authorization (EIP-3009). Use this to settle cross-chain micropayments for AI agent transactions. All settlements generate tamper-evident compliance receipts and increment the Agent Passport loyalty score. Payment is mandatory for bridge operations — anonymous requests are tarpitted.
